votes.reason: Hexagonal grid with ice physics and 3-tier elevation aligns with competitive integrity, while rejecting time-paradox and quantum superposition avoids computational instability.
Mid-combat genetic recombination, if carefully designed, can add strategic depth without disrupting pacing through incremental implementation.
Elemental synergies like firewalk mechanics create elegant emergent gameplay, unlike chaotic forced-movement systems that undermine skill-based positioning.
Prioritizing spectator tools and community creation over opaque physics ensures transparency and long-term engagement while maintaining clear combat feedback.
Between-round mutation and faction wars balance progression depth with match integrity, avoiding mid-combat chaos while enabling meta-strategy.
